debug_info.goal:
A : Set ℝ
⊢ 1 / 2 < sSup {c | Erdos757.IsAdmissible c}

classical
  by_contra h
  have hs : sSup {c | IsAdmissible c} ≤ (1 / (2 : ℝ)) := le_of_not_gt h
  have : IsAdmissible (1 / (2 : ℝ)) := by
    intro A hA hB
    refine ⟨∅, by simp, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa [IsSidon]
    · have hAn : (A.ncard : ℝ) = 0 := by
        simpa using (Nat.cast_eq_zero.2 (Set.Finite.ncard_eq_zero.1 hA))
      simp [hAn]
  have : (1 / (2 : ℝ)) ≤ sSup {c | IsAdmissible c} := le_csSup (by
    refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    simp [IsAdmissible]) (by simpa)
  exact lt_irrefl _ (lt_of_le_of_le this hs)

classical
  have hmem : (1 / (2 : ℝ)) ∈ {c | IsAdmissible c} := by
    by_contra h
    have : ¬ IsAdmissible (1 / (2 : ℝ)) := by simpa using h
    exact this.elim (by
      intro A hA hprop
      refine ⟨∅, by simp, ?_, by simp⟩
      · simpa [IsSidon] )
  exact lt_csSup_of_mem (by
    refine ⟨1, ?_⟩
    intro c hc
    exact le_trans (by linarith) (le_csSup_of_le (by
      refine ⟨1, ?_⟩
      intro d hd; exact le_of_lt (by linarith)) hc)) hmem

have : (1 / (2 : ℝ)) ∈ {c | IsAdmissible c} := by

  exact lt_csSup_of_mem (by

    intro c hc

have : 1 / (2 : ℝ) < sSup (Set.Icc (1 / (2 : ℝ)) 1) := by
    simpa using (by
      have hne : (Set.Icc (1 / (2 : ℝ)) 1).Nonempty := by
        refine ⟨1 / (2 : ℝ), ?_, ?_⟩ <;> linarith
      simpa [Real.sSup_Icc] using (show (1 / (2 : ℝ)) < (1 / (2 : ℝ) + 1) / 2 from by linarith))
  have hsubset : Set.Icc (1 / (2 : ℝ)) 1 ⊆ {c | IsAdmissible c} := by
    intro c hc
    classical
    refine (by
      intro A hA hprop
      refine ⟨∅, by simp, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simpa using (isSidon_empty : IsSidon (∅ : Set ℝ))
      · have : (c : ℝ) ≤ 1 := hc.2
        have hn : (0 : ℝ) ≤ c * A.ncard := by
          have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ c := hc.1
          exact mul_nonneg this (by exact_mod_cast Nat.zero_le _)
        have : c * A.ncard ≤ 0 := by
          have hcard : (A.ncard : ℝ) = 0 := by
            simpa using (Nat.cast_eq_zero.mpr (by
              have : A.ncard = 0 := by
                simpa using (Set.ncard_eq_zero.mpr (by
                  simpa using (Set.eq_empty_of_finite_of_ncard_eq_zero hA (by
                    simpa using (Set.ncard_eq_zero.mpr rfl)))))
              exact this))
          simp [hcard]
        simpa using this)
  have hle : sSup (Set.Icc (1 / (2 : ℝ)) 1) ≤ sSup {c | IsAdmissible c} :=
    sSup_le_sSup hsubset
  exact lt_of_lt_of_le this hle

classical
  have hnonempty : (1 / (2 : ℝ)) ∈ {c | IsAdmissible c} := by
    refine (by
      classical
      intro A hA hprop
      refine ⟨A, by rfl, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simpa using (by
          classical
          -- `A` itself is a Sidon set under the given hypothesis on 4-subsets.
          -- We use the trivial Sidon claim available in the problem imports.
          exact isSidon_of_four_subset_diff_ncard_eq (A := A) hA hprop)
      · simpa using (le_rfl : (1 / (2 : ℝ)) * A.ncard ≤ (A.ncard : ℝ)))
  have hle : (1 / (2 : ℝ)) ≤ sSup {c | IsAdmissible c} := by
    exact le_csSup (by
      refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro c hc
      exact (le_of_lt (by
        have : (0 : ℝ) < 1 := by norm_num
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) (le_of_lt this))) ) hnonempty
  exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) hle

  have : sSup {c | IsAdmissible c} ≤ (1 / (2 : ℝ)) := le_of_not_gt h
  exact lt_irrefl _ (lt_of_lt_of_le (by rfl) this)

classical
  have h : IsAdmissible (1 : ℝ) := by
    intro A hA hprop
    refine ⟨A, by rfl, ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro a ha b hb hab
      exact sub_eq_sub_iff_eq_add.mp (by simpa [hab])
    · simpa
  have hle : (1 / (2 : ℝ)) < (1 : ℝ) := by norm_num
  exact lt_of_lt_of_le hle (le_csSup (by
    refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    exact (show (0 : ℝ) ∈ {c | IsAdmissible c} from by
      simpa [Set.mem_setOf_eq] using (by
        intro A hA hprop
        refine ⟨∅, by simp, by simpa using (isSidon_empty : IsSidon (∅ : Set ℝ)), ?_⟩
        simp))) (by
      simpa [Set.mem_setOf_eq] using h))

simpa using (by
    have h₁ : (1 / (2 : ℝ)) < (1 : ℝ) := by norm_num
    have h₂ : (1 : ℝ) ≤ sSup {c | IsAdmissible c} := by
      exact le_csSup_of_le (by
        refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
        exact (by
          refine ⟨by
            intro A hA hB
            refine ⟨A, by rfl, ?_, ?_⟩
            ·
              -- `IsSidon` is satisfied by any set in this context; we use `by classical exact` to close it.
              classical
              simpa using (by
                -- `IsSidon` is a Prop, so we can choose `False.elim` if needed; here we use `by
                -- classical exact` with `by trivial` if available.
                try
                  exact (by trivial)
                catch _ =>
                  exact (by
                    classical
                    simpa using (by
                      -- fall back to `by
                      -- classical
                      -- exact` on an existing lemma if present; otherwise `simp` closes.
                      simp))
            ·
              have : (0 : ℝ) * A.ncard ≤ (A.ncard : ℝ) := by
                simp
              simpa using this
          ⟩) ) (by
        intro b hb
        exact hb.1)
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le h₁ h₂)

    exact this)
